references/eSubpackages/Projects/referen.content: Contains the elements that contribute to the Project Connectivity Viewpoint.

references/eSubpackages/Security/referen.title: Protects
references/eSubpackages/Security/referen.content: A dependency that asserts that a SecurityControl is required to protect an Asset.

references/eSubpackages/Strategic/refere.title: Desirer
references/eSubpackages/Strategic/refere.content: Abstract element used to group architecture elements that might desire a particular effect.

references/eSubpackages/Projects/referen.title: Inheritance
references/eSubpackages/Projects/referen.content: Supertypes

references/eSubpackages/Parameters/refer.title: ActualMeasurement
references/eSubpackages/Parameters/refer.content: An actual value that is applied to a Measurement.

references/eSubpackages/Security/referen.title: Roadmap
references/eSubpackages/Security/referen.content: Contains the elements that contribute to the Security Roadmap Viewpoint.

references/eSubpackages/Resources/refere.title: VersionedElement
references/eSubpackages/Resources/refere.content: An abstract grouping of ResourcePerformer and ServiceSpecification that allows VersionOfConfiguration to be related to ActualProjectMilestones.

references/eSubpackages/Strategic/refere.title: OrganizationInEnterprise
references/eSubpackages/Strategic/refere.content: An abstraction relationship relating an ActualOrganization to an ActualEnterprisePhase to denote that the ActualOrganization plays a role or is a stakeholder in an ActualEnterprisePhase.

references/eSubpackages/Operational/refe.title: OperationalExchange
references/eSubpackages/Operational/refe.content: Asserts that a flow can exist between OperationalPerformers (i.e. flows of information, people, materiel, or energy).

references/eSubpackages/Personnel/refere.title: Inheritance
references/eSubpackages/Personnel/refere.content: Supertypes

references/eSubpackages/Services/referen.title: States
references/eSubpackages/Services/referen.content: Contains the elements that contribute to the Services States Viewpoint.

references/eSubpackages/Operational/refe.title: HighLevelOperationalConcept
references/eSubpackages/Operational/refe.content: Describes the Resources and Locations required to meet an operational scenario from an integrated systems point of view. It is used to communicate overall quantitative and qualitative system characteristics to stakeholders.

references/eSubpackages/Strategic/refere.title: WholeLifeEnterprise
references/eSubpackages/Strategic/refere.content: A WholeLifeEnterprise is a purposeful endeavor of any size involving people, organizations and supporting systems. It is made up of TemporalParts and StructuralParts.
